title: Laser Placer
description: Laser Place allows you to instantly place long vertex with the simple click of a button. Speeds up path building, and improves a builder's life :)
body:
# LaserPlace — Precision Building Simplified

Client-sided. Instant. Powerful.

Build perfect lines, beams, or walls up to 128 blocks away with a single key. LaserPlace lets you place blocks instantly and undo mistakes with ease — all without lag or server commands.

## Features

- Laser Placement: Instantly place blocks in straight or diaganol lines up to 128 blocks.
- Cardinal Mode: Lock to X/Y/Z axes for clean builds, or toggle off for free placement.
- Undo System: Revert the last 10 placement actions.
- Range Control: Automatically extends your reach while active.
- Client-Sided: Works anywhere you can normally place blocks.

Default Keybinds
Key	Action
B	Toggle LaserPlace on/off
V	Place blocks in a line
N	Toggle Cardinal Mode
Z	Undo last placement (Max of 10 Undos)

(All keybinds can be changed in “LaserPlace” under Controls.)

LaserPlace makes building faster, cleaner, and easier.
Perfect for creative builders and survival architects alike.
